title: cynosurus polybracteatus var. gracilis
intro: Cynosurus polybracteatus var. gracilis, also known as slender dogstail or fine dogstail, is a variety of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cynosurus polybracteatus var. gracilis include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
